mapper.select: SELECT id, show_id as showId, price, start_time as startTime, duration, stock, total_stock as totalStock FROM sessions WHERE show_id = #{showId} ORDER BY start_time ASC
SELECT id, show_id as showId, price, start_time as startTime, duration, stock, total_stock as totalStock FROM sessions WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sessions (show_id, price, start_time, duration, stock, total_stock) VALUES (#{showId}, #{price}, #{startTime}, #{duration}, #{stock}, #{totalStock})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sessions
price = #{price},
start_time = #{startTime},
duration = #{duration},
stock = #{stock},
total_stock = #{totalStock},
WHERE id = #{id}
